meaning: adj.管状的,中空的,[医]漏管的
examples: To evaluate the effect of excision of the fistulous tract in the treatment of congenital lacrimal sac fistula.
The double pylorus is a rare condition consisting of fistulous communication between the gastric antrum and the duodenum.
Objective To observe the clinical effects of one off and traditional methods of root canal therapy in primary teeth with fistulous chronic periapical periodontitis.
